title: moehringia trinervia subsp. pentandra
intro: Moehringia trinervia subsp. pentandra, also known as the pentandrous wintercress or pentandrous starwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Moehringia trinervia subsp. pentandra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
